case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS JONES, BRENDA DARNELL AKA BRENDA DAVIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,476.50 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, BRENDA DARNELL AKA BRENDA DAVIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, BRENDA DARNELL AKA BRENDA DAVIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, BRENDA DARNELL AKA BRENDA DAVIS $2,476.50 PRINCIPAL, $25.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,502.29, DEFT TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF NOT LESS THAN $40 /MONTH BEGINNING 8/1/93 (WITH 15 DAYS GRACE PERIOD) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
